Adjunct

YeonsolKim

April 03, 2026

매우 다양한 의미로 해석된다.

Circumstance

This originated in Melanesia: 공간적 배경 This emerged during the war: 상황적 배경(가끔 시간적 배경을 의미할 수도)

Manner(과정의 양태)

He solved the problem with great difficulty: 그는 많은 우여곡절 끝에 문제를 풀었다. He spoke politely.

Purpose

She studied hard to pass the exam

Result

The boy grew up to be a famous singer.

Stimuli

I’m pleased to see you again. She smiled to see such a beautiful sight.

Evidence

He must be crazy to behave like that.

Condition

To hear them talk, you would think they are old friends.

화자의 평가

Naturally, he was very angry.

Level of Generality

Broadly speaking, there are two ways to fix the problem.

Origin

He was born of a wealthy family.

  • Subject: he
  • Predicate
    • Head(Auxiliary Verb): was
    • Complement(VP): born of a wealthy family.
      • Head: born
      • Complement(PP): of a wealthy family.
        • Head(P): of
        • Complement: a wealthy family

Ingredient

That house is made of brick.
